products.title: SUN T6 Max UV LED Nail Lamp | White | 57 LED | 220W
products.body_html:
Features

  • 220W
  • 57 LEDs
  • Preset Timers with Display
  • Automatic Sensor
  • Detachable Base
  • Dual Light Source UV/LED
  • 57 LEDs
  • 245*232*118mm

 

⚠️ Warning – Safety

Never look directly at the UV LED lamp while it is on. This lamp emits UV-A rays (long wavelength) which can damage the retina and eyes upon direct or repeated exposure. Keep out of reach of children. For prolonged use, wear UV-protective glasses.

products.title: Multi-Purpose Rechargeable Handheld Single Action Airbrush Set - Black
products.body_html:
Cleaning Required

Important: This airbrush must be cleaned after each use to prevent clogging and ensure proper performance. Gel, paint, or pigment residue can block the nozzle if not cleaned immediately.

  • Clean the cup and nozzle right after use.
  • Run cleaner through the airbrush until it sprays clear.
  • Regular maintenance helps extend the lifetime of the device.

Soft and flexible. These dividers keep your toes/fingers clean during a pedicure and manicure.

products.title: Nail Sanding Block Buffer White
IBD Nail Dehydrator (Nail Prep) 14ml
products.body_html:
PH Bond Nail Dehydrator is used in the preparation of the nail as a dehydrating agent. This product is essential in the proper preparation of the nail plate prior to the application of gel polish. 

Apply one coat of PH Bond Nail Dehydrator to the nail to dehydrate the nail plate.

  • Fast application and simple removal
  • One coat provides a gentle foundation
  • As a base for soak-off color gel polish

products.title: Magic Burst Gel Remover | Remove Gel Polish Effortlessly | 15ml
products.body_html:
With its innovative formula, this gel makes your gel or semi-permanent polish “burst” in minutes, without harsh filing or pure acetone soaking.

  • Apply directly on the polish, wait 3 - 5 minutes
  • Polish softens and lifts off easily
  • Protects your natural nails from damage
  • Perfect for removing gels, semi-permanents, and stubborn top coats
  • Volume: 15 ml, convenient and cost-effective bottle

Warning: avoid skin contact and wash hands after use.
